title: The Reverie Opens Under Hidden Shadows
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Reverie Delegates, Garp, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #15, Vivi as The Reverie gathers world leaders while hidden powers at Mariejois begin to move.
scene: World leaders gather at Mariejois while the Revolutionary Army and the secret ruler behind the Empty Throne move in the shadows.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Dalton! Dr. Kureha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I'm so glad to see you again!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah, VIVI, my dear. You're looking more gallant than ever.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: HiHihihi! Are ya happy? If I'd have known you were a queen,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'd have jacked up my treatment price a little!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Oi ol Oi, Dalton, you bastard!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How dare a servant like you tell me what is or isn't "enough"?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We now stand on equal footing!

dialogue.speaker: Reverie Delegates
dialogue.text: Besides, Dalton is a wonderful king!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: No, no...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Listen here, Dalton, you hero lurkhead!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You'll never be able to perfectly and justly rule your country!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The higher you go, the more you'll see just how dirty this world is!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Pro-ise "LL" get peee nge!

dialogue.speaker: Garp
dialogue.text: Did you read the article about Luffy?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Yes! So many times I lost count!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Tidbits about Dalton

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In the former drum kingdom, he was Wapol's servant, but with Luffy and his friends, he drove him out, and became King of Sakura kingdom - renamed to reflect the strong hopes of the people of the country.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Tidbits about Dr. Kureha

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Currently 141 years old, and often called a witch, Dr. Kureha is the doctor of the Sakura kingdom. She saved Nami's life, and is one of chopper's adoptive parents, and the one that taught him the medicine he knows.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Hey, Mr. Dalton!

dialogue.speaker: Garp
dialogue.text: Do you like Luffy?

dialogue.speaker: Garp
dialogue.text: Of course he likes Luffy- Land!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Yes. A lot.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Kyaa AAAH!:)

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: We're gonna have fun to- gether!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: The underwater prison panel down

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's with the solitary cell?! Pretty lonely down here, if ya ask me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Level 6

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: DON'T TELL ME YOU'RE PROTECTING ME, MAGELLAN!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Fufu Fufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufu!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Has he arrived? The assassin.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: To make sure I don't spill the beans on Mariejois's secret treasure

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: to anyone...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They have sent a killer to seal my lips once and for all, have they?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Fufu Fufu!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Honestly, it shouldn't matter if people find out... power has a very short shelf life.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: It rots faster than you'd believe!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: FuffUfufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufufu

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why here, in the Holy Land?! Why has this big mystery, been hidden here?!

summary: This section advances the Reverie storyline with 40 dialogue beats. The Reverie looks ceremonial on the surface, but Imu, the Five Elders, and the Revolutionaries turn it into a major political pivot.
